title: 🌈 Identity Refraction Cores
name: Identity Refraction Cores
what_it_is: Crystalline structures that split and reflect identity into multiple selves—each angle a unique but related version of the original.
how_to_use: she looks into the core—twelve versions of her walk away
his identity diffracts—becoming roles he never chose
animation_behavior: Character duplicates into paths, identity shifts by viewing angle, mirrored motions stagger like light delay ---
